scripts.dev:all: bun run dev:shared && concurrently "bun run dev:bot" "bun run dev:ride" "bun run dev:driver" "bun run dev:matching" "bun run dev:notification" "bun run dev:geocoder" "bun run dev:tracking" "bun run dev:dashboard"
scripts.build:all: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && concurrently "bun run --cwd packages/bot-whatsapp build" "bun run --cwd packages/ride-service build" "bun run --cwd packages/driver-service build" "bun run --cwd packages/matching-engine build" "bun run --cwd packages/notification-service build" "bun run --cwd packages/geocoder-service build" "bun run --cwd packages/tracking-service build" "bun run --cwd packages/web-central build"
